en_title: Supergirl Reportedly Faced Creative Differences Between DC Studios and Craig Gillespie
cn_title: 《超级少女》据报因创作分歧测试两个剪辑版本
subtitle: 两个版本打擂台
opus_summary: 据报道，DC Studios与导演Craig Gillespie在《超级少女》上存在创作分歧，发行前数月曾测试导演版和工作室版两个剪辑。最终工作室版仅以2分优势胜出并进入院线。

paragraphs.en: Creative differences reportedly led James Gunn and Peter Safran's DC Studios to test competing Supergirl cuts – one from director Craig Gillespie and one from the studio – just months before its release.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，创作分歧导致James Gunn和Peter Safran的DC Studios在《超级少女》上映前几个月测试了两个竞争剪辑版本：一个来自导演Craig Gillespie，一个来自工作室。

paragraphs.en: Behind-the-scenes details from the latest DCU movie suggest creative differences had the crew battling to choose a direction for Milly Alcock's standalone superhero debut, according to The Hollywood Reporter . Updates on the flick's development follow a week of negative reactions from fans hoping Supergirl would have taken flight before it bombed during its opening weekend at the box office .
paragraphs.cn: 据The Hollywood Reporter报道，最新DCU电影的幕后细节显示，创作分歧让剧组在为Milly Alcock的独立超级英雄首秀选择方向时陷入拉扯。关于本片开发的更新出现在粉丝负面反应持续一周之后。粉丝本希望《超级少女》能在首周末票房爆雷前先起飞。

paragraphs.en: The site says "numerous sources" reported creative differences between Gunn and Gillespie, specifically, with the film pulling test scores that struggled to break 70 out of a possible 100 points. While some said DC Studios and the director had a normal amount of friction during Supergirl, another said a polite way to describe the dissonance would be to say they were "not creatively aligned."
paragraphs.cn: 该网站称，「多名消息人士」报告了Gunn和Gillespie之间的创作分歧，具体来说，这部电影的试映分数很难突破满分100分中的70分。虽然有人说DC Studios和导演在《超级少女》制作期间存在正常程度的摩擦，但另一人表示，若要礼貌地描述这种不一致，可以说他们「创作上并不一致」。

paragraphs.en: DC Studios had allegedly known Supergirl would face issues as early as fall of 2025, just a few months after filming finished that May. Gunn and Safran's DC film wing jumped in after a so-so screening aired in December 2025, with the studio then creating its own cut of the film with the aid of Mortal Kombat 2 and Moon Knight writer Jeremy Slater.
paragraphs.cn: 据称，DC Studios早在2025年秋季就知道《超级少女》会面临问题，当时距离同年5月拍摄完成只过去几个月。2025年12月一次反响平平的放映后，Gunn和Safran领导的DC电影部门介入，随后工作室在《真人快打2》和《月光骑士》编剧Jeremy Slater协助下制作了自己的剪辑版本。

paragraphs.en: At least four test screenings aired throughout December 2025, February 2026, and March 2026. Although some winter screenings returned test scores in the low 70s, DC Studios called for two cuts to be made: one from Gillespie and one from the studio. The exact differences between the two are unclear, but as previously rumored, the director's is said to have been about 11 minutes longer and featured a greater emphasis on Matthias Schoenaerts' antagonist, Krem.
paragraphs.cn: 2025年12月、2026年2月和2026年3月期间，至少进行了四场测试放映。虽然一些冬季放映的试映分数处于70分出头，DC Studios仍要求制作两个剪辑版本：一个来自Gillespie，一个来自工作室。两者的确切差异尚不清楚，但正如此前传闻所说，导演版据称长约11分钟，并更强调Matthias Schoenaerts饰演的反派Krem。

paragraphs.en: It was during the period that saw the two screenings test against one another that scores dropped. DC Studios' won out – but only by two points – and, ultimately, became the version of the film it chose to send to theaters in late June. One Hollywood Reporter source said that, after this point, if Gillespie had strong opinions on the movie, he would have to advocate for any changes.
paragraphs.cn: 正是在两个版本互相测试的这段期间，分数下降了。DC Studios版本胜出，但只领先2分，并最终成为工作室选择在6月底送进院线的版本。一名The Hollywood Reporter消息人士称，在此之后，如果Gillespie对电影有强烈意见，他就必须为任何改动据理力争。

paragraphs.en: "It happens more than you think, but it’s not normal," one anonymous filmmaker, who was not involved with Supergirl, said of the decision to test two competing cuts. "If a studio is going to put money into the test process, it means they feel strongly about certain things."
paragraphs.cn: 一名未参与《超级少女》的匿名电影人谈到测试两个竞争剪辑版本的决定时说：「这种事发生得比你想象中多，但它并不正常。如果一家工作室愿意把钱投进测试流程，那说明他们对某些事情有很强烈的感受。」

paragraphs.en: Another element that remained important for DC Studios and Gillespie to tackle during the post-production process involved something that has proven to be a hot topic since Supergirl premiered – its music. Fans have poked fun at the film's soundtrack in the days since its launch, with its use of a cover of Jimmy Eat World's "The Middle" during a late-movie moment being especially controversial .
paragraphs.cn: 在后期制作过程中，DC Studios和Gillespie还必须处理另一个重要元素，而它自《超级少女》首映以来已经成为热门话题：音乐。影片上映后的几天里，粉丝一直拿它的原声开玩笑，其中在电影后段某个时刻使用Jimmy Eat World的《The Middle》翻唱版本尤其有争议。

paragraphs.en: Gillespie previously stated that Gunn is the one who made the call to include the song, and The Hollywood Reporter's sources agree. They added that a February screening included Cyndi Lauper's "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" during the moment instead. Gunn is said to have chosen this song, as well, before swapping it out for The Middle.
paragraphs.cn: Gillespie此前表示，是Gunn决定加入这首歌，The Hollywood Reporter的消息人士也同意这一点。他们补充说，2月的一场放映在同一时刻使用的是Cyndi Lauper的《Girls Just Want to Have Fun》。据称Gunn同样选择了这首歌，之后又把它换成了《The Middle》。

paragraphs.en: Supergirl put Alcock center stage when it premiered June 26. Despite only one week in theaters and presumably at least a few more to go, things aren't looking too hot for the DCU's new hero. A report from earlier this week suggested Warner Bros. and DC Studios could stand to lose more than $100 million from its time in theaters .
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》于6月26日上映，让Alcock站到舞台中央。尽管它只上映了一周，按理还至少会继续放映几周，但DCU这位新英雄的情况看起来并不太妙。本周早些时候的一篇报道称，华纳兄弟和DC Studios可能会因为本片院线表现损失超过1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)。

paragraphs.en: IGN gave Supergirl a 6/10 review . We said, "Supergirl borrows from the best, but Milly Alcock’s great take on Kara Zor-El gets lost in the spare parts from other movies used to assemble her story."
paragraphs.cn: IGN给《超级少女》打出6/10分。我们写道：「《超级少女》借用了最好的东西，但Milly Alcock对Kara Zor-El的出色诠释迷失在用其他电影零件拼装故事的过程里。」
